reviews.comment:
Malísimo! Mucha espera. Un solo empleado. Más surtidores cerrados que abiertos. No voy más. Me cruzo a la shell

(Translated by Google)
Terrible! Long waits. Only one employee. More pumps closed than open. I'm never going back. I'm crossing over to the Shell station.

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar, tiene servicompras, baños públicos, sector de descanso con mesas, sillas y sombra de árboles.
La atención es excelente.
El acceso desde panamericana es muy bueno.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place, it has convenience stores, public restrooms, and a rest area with tables, chairs, and shaded trees.
The service is excellent.
Access from the Pan-American Highway is very good.
